Name.jp: ペンギン海賊・マスケット

name.jp: パーン! 涼しいでしょ!

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAt the start of battle, increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>間<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
